# 724 Tesisatçı

Official website: https://724tesisatci.com/

Business name: 724 Tesisatçı

Phone: +90 532 346 87 69

Address: Emniyet Evleri, Semerkant Sk. 14/A, 34415 Kağıthane/İstanbul

Coordinates: 41.0843817, 29.0005683

Primary service area: Kağıthane and supported districts in İstanbul
